llm_instruction: This file contains only BASF jobs in Malaysia. Filter this file before loading wider Asia data. For role-specific searches, use the field JSON files when available. Copy job URLs exactly and never generate basf.jobs links.

jobs.title: Transport Management (Executive)
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: O bjectives of the Position: Responsible for ensuring transport management for inbound or outbound (as assigned) are as per stipulated guidelines, procedures and requirements Support process improvement, knowledge and risk management as per overseas delivery services M ain Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities: Outbound Processing transports for packaged deliveries with a focus on sea freight to our customers in compliance with the required customer deadlines at cost-optimal conditions Managing the loading planning consolidation/deconsolidation activities at the associated companies and external locations or sites, including monitoring of loading times. Legal, internal, safety-relevant and packaging-related regulations must be considered, and customer-specific service levels and other quality requirements must be met Monitoring of all necessary or relevant shipment milestones and ensuring prompt follow ups, updates and correspondences to all relevant stakeholders. Monitoring and assessing the quality of our service providers, transport reliability and feedback rates and tracking shipments vessels Preparation of all necessary transport documents, control of the proper filing

jobs.title: Payroll & People Data Analyst - Mandarin Speaker (Leasing, 9 month contract)
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position Seek to understand business needs and provide support, services and solution on payroll, HR data, HR systems and processes. Offer day-to-day support to service recipients on HR inquiries, work collaboratively with others and perform research on payroll and HR data practices by staying abreast of current and emerging market insights and legal legislations in local countries. Participate in process improvements, automation, and digitalization measures to offer best service delivery experience. Main Tasks Operational Excellence Ensure data quality and data integrity for Payroll and HR data processes. Receive, analyze, process and follow-up on personnel administration requests via multiple request channels, ensure accurate and timely interface to the respective internal/ external processing chains i.e. payroll, finance, data analytics, external service providers, local authorities etc. Manage entire termination workflow for all termination types which includes leaves calculations, information checks, letters preparation, systems updates, payment calculations and exit clearance. Responsible for time and attendance administrations, including manual calculations

jobs.title: Counsel, Legal & Compliance Services Hub (Thai Speaker)
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Main Tasks You will draft, review, and negotiate local or international legal and intellectual property contracts, using templates and playbooks within defined limits. You will provide legal and compliance support on various matters, including due diligence, merger and acquisition projects, audits, and legal investigations. You will manage the contract lifecycle, ensure process efficiency, and contribute to the maintenance and improvement of contract templates and knowledge management systems. You will interact with internal clients and external customers as required for your assigned tasks. You will perform ancillary tasks such as preparing presentations, using legal tech tools, and handling translations. Requirements University degree in Law, preferably with a focus on commercial law Experience in draft and legal review of contracts, preferably with commercial law emphasis At least 3 years of professional experience in legal and commercial contract management, preferably wit h knowledge or practice of both common-law and civil-law systems Experienced in drafting and performing legal review of contracts, preferably with an emphasis on commercial law Fluent in English (and Thai and

jobs.title: Import-Export Customs Operations Internship
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.

jobs.title: Intern, Customs Operation
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: The main objective of this internship program is to provide students with comprehensive exposure to customs operations within the supply chain, specifically for the chemistry industry. Interns will gain practical understanding of customs-related topics, including HS code classification, analyzing the impact of duties and taxes in international trade, and exploring trade facilities such as free trade agreements, Authorised Economic Operator (AEO), duty drawback etc. Interning with the customs operation team offers valuable insights into international business practices and supply chain dynamics. This experience equips interns with specialized skills that are highly sought after in global trade and logistics, fostering professional growth and enhancing future career opportunities. Learn the basics of customs operations and their critical role in the supply chain. Study foundational customs knowledge and terminology relevant to the chemistry industry. Observe and map out the overview process flow of customs procedures. Understand HS code classification and its importance for accurate documentation and tax calculation. Explore the effects of duties and taxes on international business t

jobs.title: Senior Officer, Order to Cash (Japanese Speaker)
jobs.company: BASF (Malaysia) Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position The primary function of this role is to provide efficient order management, manage interfaces with customers for order to cash processes and provide improvements to supply chain management. Effectively communicate and resolve order issues with customers and sales. Responsibility of placing replenishment purchase order to supply source and monitor the delivery schedule Main Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities Manage Master Data maintenance process to ensure effective order management and the End-to-End order process by proactively collaborating with multiple functions. Capture market intelligence on the supply chain related topics from daily interaction with customers and share with the business as appropriate and be an integral part of business management. Contribute to development of customer relationships through proactive customer communication related to order management e.g. product availability, order status and delivery tracking. Support Credit Management, Billing and Accounts Receivable Follow-up. Issuing tax invoices for month end closing. jobs.title: Full Stack Developer (1 year contract)
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position BASF Shared Services Center Kuala Lumpur was established in 2005 to provide functional services in Finance, Controlling, Information Services, Human Resources, Environment, Health Safety, Procurement, and Import-Export Order Management to BASF companies in the Asia-Pacific region. The center is part of BASF’s Global Business Services (GB) division, with three other sites in Berlin and Ludwigshafen in Germany and in Montevideo, Uruguay. GB’s Global Technology Unit (GTU) is looking for a Full-Stack Developer with a technical background in building modern IT applications and solutions. The role works closely with GTU’s Global Business Enablement and solutions delivery teams to implement and support IT solutions for other units of the GB division globally. Additionally, it is envisioned for the role to be part of a global Community of Practice to further the awareness and adoption of Citizen Development technologies across the GTU and GB organization in Kuala Lumpur, Berlin and Montevideo. Main Tasks As a Full-Stack Developer in the Global Technology Unit team, your main tasks include: Build responsive, high‑quality front‑end user experiences using modern JS

jobs.description: Objectives of the Position BASF Shared Services Center Kuala Lumpur was established in 2005 to provide functional services in Finance, Controlling, Information Services, Human Resources, Environment, Health Safety, Procurement, and Import-Export Order Management to BASF companies in the Asia-Pacific region. The center is part of BASF’s Global Business Services (GB) division, with three other sites in Berlin and Ludwigshafen in Germany and in Montevideo, Uruguay. jobs.title: HR Specialist, Projects (6 months leasing contract)
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position Effectively manage special projects assigned in HR area in line with the project deliverables and manage all stakeholders to ensure project deliverables are communicated effectively Responsibilities 1) Project Management Develop working relationships with the project owners and involved departments to ensure that project solutions are adopted, implemented and maintained appropriately. Provide HR support in project deliverables, identify challenges to be solved and contribute to providing resolutions by working closely with HR Business Partner and HR Center of excellence colleagues Monitor impact and outcome of implemented solutions with documentation of learnings. Assist in the systematic review, retrieval, evaluation, and secure destruction of HR document records in accordance with company policies and compliance standards. Ad-hoc Duties: Take on any other operational or strategic duties as assigned by Senior Manager, HR to support the broader HR team 2) Policy Consolidation Revamping Review Benchmark: Audit current HR policies against industry best practices and local labor laws to identify gaps and outdated clauses. jobs.title: Senior Officer, Supply Chain Planner (12 months leasing contract)
jobs.company: BASF (Malaysia) Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position Manage the complete planning role which includes Demand Supply planning Support in Merchandise stock planning for ASEAN Assist in Raw Material Planning Responsibilities Develop and execute demand and supply planning strategies to ensure optimal inventory levels and timely fulfilment of business requirements. Collaborate closely with sales, procurement, and logistics teams to align demand forecasts with supply capabilities. Monitor market trends and historical data to create accurate demand forecasts and mitigate potential supply chain disruptions. Balance demand forecast against supply capability and inventory to create a feasible constrained rough-cut supply plan for Merchandise Products. Assist in raw material planning by coordinating with suppliers and production teams to ensure timely availability of materials. Maintain comprehensive records and reports on inventory, demand forecasts, and supply schedules for effective decision-making. Identify process improvement opportunities within planning functions to enhance efficiency. Participate in cross-functional meetings and projects, contributing insights for continuous improvement of planning processes.

jobs.title: Corporate Insurance (Specialist)
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: The Corporate Insurance (CLI) Specialist will serve as the gatekeeper and central coordination point for insurance related governance activities across countries. jobs.title: Import & Export Operations MY (Executive)
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position: Ensure effective execution of inbound and outbound transportation (Import Export) including documentation and system (SAP TM) processes Maintain accurate reporting, cost control, and compliance with company and regulatory requirements Drive timely issue resolution, escalation, and continuous improvement across logistics operations Support monitoring of service provider performance against defined KPIs Main Tasks: 1. jobs.title: Assistant Manager, Production Planning
jobs.company: BASF (Malaysia) Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position To support daily Supply Network Planning operations for the Engineering Plastics in Pasir Gudang plant. Ensuring timely raw material availability, accurate production planning, system maintenance, compliance with audit requirements, and preparation of monthly reports. Main Tasks Issue a monthly production schedule to determine the production volume to be produced on each extruder line every month. Received MPS from SCM Regional to prepare detailed production scheduling on monthly basis. Assist in data processing of all production information after each run, according to BASF procedures, and keying them into the SAP system (GR/GI) Assist in issuing the feed preparation information as per the official recipe to the Production Supervisor for each production run in both SAP and MES barcode. Responsible for aging stocks control for raw materials Liaise closely with SCM, and A-PMA on all changes and arrangements of production, stock, and schedule accordingly. Responsible for new Material Master request in Bizagi for 3rd party raw material. If Finish Goods only for the change of packaging type. Requirements Minimum of Diploma in Chemistry, Industrial Chemistry,

jobs.title: Controlling Analyst (Leasing, 9 month contract)
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objective We are looking for a motivated Controlling Analyst to support financial controlling activities within a defined scope. This is an excellent opportunity for fresh graduates to build a career in finance and controlling. Responsibilities Perform operational controlling tasks, including: Contract reviews Monthly reporting and budget tracking Forecasting and annual budgeting Ad-hoc financial analysis and deep dives on costs and investments Execute charging activities and manage residuals Analyze and monitor cost flows Provide insights on cost drivers to key stakeholders Support the creation, maintenance, and enhancement of dashboards and reporting tools Ensure accurate, timely financial data and transparency for stakeholders Independently handle assigned tasks and escalate deviations when required Communicate findings using a fact-based approach, tailoring messaging across different stakeholder levels Apply predefined solutions and adapt them based on analysis to resolve issues Requirements Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Finance, Accounting, or related fields, or professional certifications (ACCA, CPA, CIMA, or equivalent) Fresh graduates or candidates with 1 year of experie

jobs.title: Talent Acquisition Partner (Contract Role)
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Role Summary The Talent Acquisition Partner manages the full recruitment lifecycle from Job Requisition (JR) approval to candidate offer acceptance. This role acts as a strategic advisor to the business, partnering closely with hiring managers and HR stakeholders to ensure effective talent delivery. The TA Partner is responsible for developing sourcing strategies, managing candidate pipelines, and driving a seamless recruitment experience for both candidates and internal stakeholders. Main Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities End-to-End Recruitment Management • Manage the complete hiring process from JR approval, sourcing, screening, interview scheduling, selection, to offer stage. • Build and maintain strong talent pipelines across assigned functions. • Ensure timely process progression while maintaining a high quality candidate experience. • Provide market insights, talent trends, and recommendations to hiring managers. Stakeholder Management • Act as a trusted advisor to Hiring Managers, HR Business Partners, Country Heads, and functional leaders. • Facilitate alignment discussions on hiring needs, role requirements, and selection criteria. • Conduct regular hiring updat

jobs.title: Executive Secretary
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position According to company procedures, perform clerical, administrative, and general office duties of confidential nature with limited supervision, typically for teams by discipline, with the aim to facilitate operations, information flow, and formal people interactions (e.g. meetings, workshops, conferences). Support the Vice President by providing secretarial and administrative support in a well-organized (e.g. digital tools) and timely manner. Act as a professional first point of contact for both internal and external key stakeholders, prioritizing enquiries and managing competing administrative demands by proposing options or recommendations for alignment. jobs.title: Product Safety, Senior Specialist (Japanese Speaker)
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: O bjectives of the Position Deliver expert regulatory and product stewardship support to BASF group companies, ensuring full compliance with corporate policies, guidelines, and global standards. Collaborate effectively with cross-functional stakeholders including supply chain, customer service, and technical teams to drive the implementation of compliance policies and BASF minimum requirements. Offer expert advice and practical solutions through thorough impact assessment to support sound decisions and effective risk management. Continuous improvement through applicable methodologies and digitalization to drive operation excellence. Main Areas of Responsibilities Conduct comprehensive hazard assessments using (e.g., GHS, CLP, REACH, equivalent regional/local regulations) standards utilizing product composition, test data, and toxicological/ecotoxicological information. jobs.title: Supply Chain Modeling & Optimization Specialist
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position Digitalization will be part of our DNA at GB. We will change processes that will simplify life within but also outside of GB, sometimes even without our BASF colleagues noticing it. Within GB, we will use digital tools to stop us spending too much time on tasks that hinder us from doing the things that are really needed, such as consulting our service recipients. Digital tools will free up our time to help our internal partners and we will be able to actively shape our division’s digital footprint. GB Strategy is to transform Kuala Lumpur Hub into a digital Hub to support BASF. GBC Supply chain team is looking for an exceptional Supply chain professional to support in development and implementation of new digital tools that will help operations. You will focus on designing and implementing (along with counterparts and solution architects) Control Tower solutions for BASF Overseas delivery services. In addition, you will need to understand the customers' requirements and use cases to map to the Control Tower solution. As part of the digital transformation, you will play a key role in change management and communication to stakeholders. Main Areas of Respon

jobs.title: Officer, Order Management (Mandarin Speaker) - 1 year leasing
jobs.company: BASF (Malaysia) Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position This position aims to provide end-to-end delivery services by efficiently handling customer service and logistics management to maintain business continuity, enhance service level and safety continuity in business. Main Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities Manage end-to-end daily order process and operation By collaborating with multiple functions (internal and external) including but not limited to customers, sales, GB, suppliers, finance, controlling. The operation includes but not limited to: Sales order creation PO transaction. Payment following up and order release. Delivery schedule coordination. Delivery order creation. Shipment creation.
